name: RawToStagingTransformer

neutralConcepts: CF-192: raw→staging zone promotion only — never raw→core or raw→mart direct
Schema validation BEFORE normalization — quarantine on schema failure
DNA-7: idempotency check before staging write
Quarantine records stored in xiigen-quarantine-records with knowledgeScope PRIVATE
RecordQuarantined emitted for every quarantined record

ironRules.rule: CF-192: raw→staging promotion only — never skip to core or mart.
Schema validation BEFORE normalization — invalid records quarantined.
Idempotency check BEFORE staging write — DNA-7.
All stored records include knowledgeScope: PRIVATE.

keywords: raw to staging transformer schema validation normalization quarantine zone promotion CF-192 DNA-7 DNA-8 RecordPromotedToStaging RecordQuarantined
